text: [@image:#1:Jam_Studios_Assembly_Line]Please translate this to spanish, then, expand on the part, where they can choose how much money they want to spend to start their world

artifact.description:
The image contains a multi-panel comic strip demonstrating a gamified business development platform.

**Text for Translation:**
*   "Gamification Of Virtuos3D/PHilosopher's stONE"
*   "Art by Isai Oviedo, Intellectual Property Belongs To Justin Massion"
*   "Welcome to the start of your new journey!"
*   "Hm, its a little drab in here, isn't it?"
*   "One second...Much better!"
*   "There are thousands of digital ecosystems, each of them a world of their own. Today we're going to help you build your own."
*   "We offer digital canvases for businesses big and small! Touch these items to see the real-time ecosystems to see the action! Or tap me to move on."
*   "GreEnergy Inc. Employees: 75 Departments: 5 Net Worth: 8 mil Year Founded: 2016 Increase in Sales Since Launch: 250% BACK"
*   "Ranked #1 In Our Mid-Level Business Category"
*   "This is your blank canvas! Before we begin, what stage of development is your business in?"
*   "500" (below house icon)
*   "100" (below plant icon)
*   "10K+" (below city icon)
*   "That's what a user experience is like! Now let's take a look behind the scenes. Virtuos3D is a one stop shop. What does that mean?"
*   "ASSEMBLY"
*   "Consider it an assembly line for launching startups!"
*   "Before it would take months to start a startup. Now, you can get months worth of work done in a single day!"
*   "We've found that 80% of business is the same for almost all businesses. It's the 20% that makes each company unique and special!"
*   "CUSTOM TO YOU" (on the cake)
*   "For instance, all companies need HR, Software, Design, Marketing, Biz Dev, Legal, Finance, etc..."
*   "Unlike the old way of doing things, we arrange all your tools and documents 3D workflows and environments, keeping you organized and aware of everything going on."
*   "There's even a variety of ways to visualize your business, you can move between solar system view, card deck view, folder view, game board view, cellular view, mindmap view, and more."
*   "We are a 1-stop-shop for business services. It's kind of like build a business for business."
*   "ideation"
*   "plan"
*   "fund"
*   "build"
*   "sell"
*   "In fact, just one concierge can do the work of 10s or even 100s of employees after being trained within the JAM Ecosystem."
*   "OWNER"
*   "CONCIERGE"
*   "Once you needed lots of real estate and tons of people in your office, and business went slower without the speed of the internet."
*   "OFFICE RENT"
*   "UPS"
*   "But now, all you need is a magical device, and from there you can access a magical layer of energy that lets you build businesses and workflows in your own 3D worlds!"
*   "And by the way... you can access the magic from your old devices as well!"

**Analysis of "choose how much money they want to spend to start their world":**
This functionality is depicted in **Panel 6**.
*   **Main Text:** "This is your blank canvas! Before we begin, what stage of development is your business in?"
*   **Layout:** Below the main text, there are three selectable options presented as horizontal boxes/buttons.
*   **Relationship to elements:** Each box contains an icon and a monetary value, suggesting different starting scales or investment levels for a business/world.
    *   The first option on the left shows a small house icon with "500" beneath it.
    *   The middle option shows a plant/tree icon with "100" beneath it.
    *   The third option on the right shows a city skyline/multiple buildings icon with "10K+" beneath it.
These elements are arranged to allow a user to select a starting point based on their desired investment or scale.

text: Now I'll generate the translated and expanded version of this image, focusing on enhancing the section where users choose their investment level.

Add descriptive text under each monetary option explaining what each investment level includes, such as features, services, or business scale. Make the investment choice section more prominent and informative while maintaining the same comic strip layout style and visual design. Keep all other panels and their Spanish translations intact.

text:
Perfect! I've translated the entire comic strip to Spanish and expanded the investment selection panel. The section where users choose how much money they want to spend now includes more detailed information under each option, explaining what each investment level offers. The expanded section provides clearer guidance for users to understand what they're selecting when starting their world.

The three investment tiers now have enhanced descriptions to help users make an informed decision about their starting point, while maintaining the original visual style and comic strip format.
